description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular handgun with a weathered, metallic exterior showing patches of rust and discoloration, suggesting prolonged exposure to the elements or heavy use. The main body is blocky and robust, with a thick, squared-off slide and a short, stubby barrel visible at the front. The grip is integrated into the lower portion, appearing solid and angular, with a dark, mottled texture that contrasts with the rest of the frame. The trigger guard is broad and angular, forming a protective enclosure around the trigger area. There are no visible engravings, logos, or decorative markings on the slide or frame, giving the weapon a utilitarian, almost industrial appearance. The magazine base is flush with the grip, lacking any pronounced extension or embellishment.
description: A compact, blocky handgun with a weathered, rusted metal finish and a solid, angular grip. The design is utilitarian, with no visible markings or embellishments.
description_view_0: The front and side of the handgun are visible, showing the short barrel, thick slide, and the angular grip with a mottled, dark texture.
description_view_1: The rear and side of the handgun are shown, highlighting the flat back of the grip and the squared-off slide with visible rust and wear.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the underside and side of the handgun, revealing the flush magazine base and the robust, rectangular frame.
description_view_3: The back and top of the handgun are visible, displaying the full length of the slide and the weathered, metallic surface with no visible markings.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is solid and angular, with a broad, flat surface and a mottled, dark texture that suggests a rough, non-slip finish. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or decorative embellishments, and the grip appears to be made from a polymer or composite material. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing function over aesthetics, and lacks any checkering or stippling patterns.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is broad, thick, and angular, forming a rectangular enclosure around the trigger area. It lacks any undercuts, texturing, or reinforcement, and does not feature any integrated accessories or distinctive design elements. The overall style is simple and robust, matching the utilitarian look of the handgun.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and stubby, with a plain, unadorned exterior and no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. The finish is consistent with the rest of the handgun, showing signs of rust and wear, and there are no visible markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and weathered, with a rough, rusted finish and no manufacturer logos, model names, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip, featuring a flat, unembellished design with no extensions, finger rests, or texturing. The contour is simple and squared-off, consistent with the overall utilitarian appearance of the handgun.
